hero.title: Building the future with code and intelligence.
hero.description: Specializing in production-grade web applications with integrated AI capabilities. Based in Germany and ready for relocation across Germany.

about.label: Identity
about.title: Who I Am
about.paragraph1: I am a Full-Stack Developer based in Germany, combining thoughtful frontend craft with reliable backend architecture.
about.paragraph2: I bring leadership, adaptability, and a strong eye for detail to every project I join.

ai.label: AI Integration
ai.title: My AI Twin
ai.intro1: This site does not just show my AI skills. It demonstrates them live through the assistant placed beside my name in the hero section.
ai.intro2: Ask it about my work, stack, relocation across Germany, or my frontend experience at Kunst Schule Berlin from January 2026 to April 2026.
ai.link: Open the assistant in the hero section
features: Easy to integrate into products and websites

items.description: Frontend experience at Kunst Schule Berlin from January 2026 to April 2026.
Advanced full-stack program covering React, Node.js, TypeScript, Docker, and cloud platforms. Focus on building production-grade, AI-integrated web applications.
Language mediation DE <-> RU/UK in medical and social institutions. Assisted with digital applications, authority forms, and cross-cultural communication.
Full business management: team leadership, tournament organization, PR, budget planning. Led a diverse team and grew the school's community presence significantly.
Academic foundation in analytical thinking, discipline, and scientific rigor that now informs systematic, precision-focused software development.

contact.label: Let's Connect
contact.title: Contact
contact.opportunities: I am currently open to full-time roles, freelance projects, and AI integration consulting.
contact.location: Germany, Oschatz - Ready for relocation across Germany and open to remote collaboration.

chat.welcome: Hello, I'm Anastasiia's AI assistant. I can tell you about her skills, projects, relocation across Germany, frontend experience at Kunst Schule Berlin, and professional strengths.
chat.placeholder: Ask about skills, relocation across Germany, frontend experience at Kunst Schule Berlin, AI work, or career goals...

Is she ready for relocation across Germany?
